summary: Shallow appliance checks show the local ASMS UI edge is healthy: Apache is active, listeners are present, localhost serves the legacy entry points and the /algosec-ui/login shell, so the frontline classification is external path or browser-side issue rather than local UI startup failure.
follow_up_recommendations: Validate client-to-appliance reachability and any reverse proxy or load balancer path in front of the appliance.
Check whether the issue is browser- or user-specific by reproducing from a fresh browser session and another client path.
Only if a shallow path begins failing, continue to the next recommended task or targeted login-path diagnostics.
